title: The Document-Oriented Data Layer in a Full-Stack Application
description: This flowchart illustrates the flow of a NoSQL document (e.g., a user profile) through the different layers of a full-stack application, from the database to the client-side UI.
relationships: Sends HTTP Request (GET/POST/PUT/DELETE) with query parameters
Processes request, validates data, and calls service functions
Interacts with the Database Driver to perform CRUD operations
Translates application objects into database queries and documents
Stores and retrieves BSON/JSON documents in a collection
